description: Spec-driven feature tracking for autonomous coding sessions. Based on Anthropic autonomous-coding pattern.
important_rules: NEVER remove features from this list - only update status
NEVER mark a feature as 'passed' without end-to-end verification
NEVER modify feature descriptions after generation
Work on ONE feature at a time until it passes or is marked failed
Always leave code in merge-ready state before ending session
summary: Lovable.dev-like AI website generation system for Odoo - 203 features across 6 phases

features.description: Create AgentEngine class with state management (goal, plan, context, iteration, status, errors, filesModified, qualityScore)
features.rationale: AgentEngine is the foundation - manages the entire autonomous execution lifecycle

verification.criteria: AgentEngine instantiates with proper initial state and exposes execute() method

features.description: Implement 5-iteration self-correction loop with quality threshold (qualityScore >= 80 to pass)
features.rationale: Self-correction loop is the #1 differentiator - Lovable achieves 90% error reduction through this

verification.criteria: Loop continues until quality >= 80 or max 5 iterations; emits iteration events

features.description: Add plan generation phase using LLM with structured JSON output (steps array with action, target, rationale)
features.rationale: Structured plans enable step-by-step execution and progress tracking

verification.criteria: planPhase() returns valid AgentPlan with steps array; each step has action, target, rationale

features.description: Create step execution dispatcher routing plan steps to appropriate tools based on action type
features.rationale: Dispatcher enables modular tool execution without hardcoded switch statements

verification.criteria: executeStep() routes 'search' to search_codebase, 'read' to read_file, etc.

features.description: Implement validation phase aggregating QWeb, SCSS, accessibility, and Odoo structure checks
features.rationale: Validation gate catches errors before they reach users; enables self-correction

verification.criteria: validatePhase() runs all validators in parallel; returns aggregated pass/fail with errors array

features.description: Add error injection system feeding validation failures back to LLM context for fix generation
features.rationale: Error context enables LLM to generate targeted fixes instead of blind regeneration

verification.criteria: Errors include file path, line number, error message, and suggested fix area

features.description: Create re-planning logic that incorporates error context to generate corrective plan steps
features.rationale: Re-planning with errors enables intelligent self-correction, not just retry

verification.criteria: replanWithErrors() generates new plan targeting specific error files/lines

features.description: Implement progress event emitter streaming status updates via SSE (phase, step, percentage)
features.rationale: Real-time progress feedback is essential for UX; users need to see what agent is doing

verification.criteria: Events emitted every 500ms with { phase, step, percentage, message }

features.description: Add iteration tracking with diminishing returns detection (quality not improving = stop early)
features.rationale: Prevents infinite loops when errors are unfixable; saves tokens and time

verification.criteria: Loop exits early if quality score doesn't improve for 2 consecutive iterations

features.description: Create finalization logic producing AgentResult with success/warning/failure states and summary
features.rationale: Clear result states enable UI to show appropriate feedback and next actions

verification.criteria: finalize() returns { status, filesModified, qualityScore, iterations, summary, warnings }

features.description: Create ToolExecutor base class with common execution patterns (timeout, retry, caching)
features.rationale: Base class ensures consistent behavior across all tools

verification.criteria: ToolExecutor provides execute() with automatic timeout, retry, and result caching

features.description: Implement tool result caching with 5-minute TTL to avoid redundant operations
features.rationale: Caching reduces token costs and execution time for repeated queries

verification.criteria: Same tool call within 5 minutes returns cached result; cache key includes parameters

features.description: Add parallel tool execution for independent operations using Promise.all
features.rationale: Parallel execution reduces total generation time significantly

verification.criteria: Independent tools execute concurrently; dependent tools wait for prerequisites

features.description: Create tool timeout handling with 30-second default and configurable per-tool limits
features.rationale: Timeouts prevent hung operations from blocking the entire agent

verification.criteria: Tools abort after timeout; return ToolTimeoutError with partial results if available

features.description: Implement tool error recovery with exponential backoff retry (max 3 attempts)
features.rationale: Transient errors (network, rate limits) often succeed on retry

verification.criteria: Failed tools retry with 1s, 2s, 4s delays; give up after 3 attempts

features.description: Add tool usage analytics tracking invocation count, latency, and token cost per tool
features.rationale: Analytics enable optimization and cost tracking

verification.criteria: Each tool call logs { tool, duration, tokens, success } to analytics store

features.description: Implement search_codebase tool using ripgrep for fast text search with semantic ranking
features.rationale: Codebase search enables agent to find relevant files without loading entire project

verification.criteria: Returns top 10 results with { path, snippet, relevance }; supports glob filtering

features.description: Create read_file tool with optional line range support for focused context
features.rationale: On-demand file reading keeps context window manageable

verification.criteria: Returns file content; optional lines parameter returns specific range

features.description: Implement write_file tool with automatic Yjs document sync for real-time collaboration
features.rationale: Yjs integration ensures AI writes sync to all connected clients

verification.criteria: Write triggers Y.Doc update; connected editors receive change within 100ms

features.description: Create edit_file tool with search/replace operations for targeted modifications
features.rationale: Targeted edits are more reliable than full file rewrites

verification.criteria: Applies array of { search, replace, all } operations; returns diff

features.description: Implement validate_qweb tool checking XML syntax, t-directive validity, and template references
features.rationale: QWeb validation catches Odoo-specific template errors before deployment

verification.criteria: Validates t-if, t-foreach, t-call directives; checks template inheritance

features.description: Create compile_scss tool using dart-sass with Odoo variable imports
features.rationale: SCSS compilation catches syntax errors and validates variable usage

verification.criteria: Compiles SCSS with Odoo imports; returns CSS or errors with line numbers

features.description: Implement preview_render tool generating screenshot of current theme state
features.rationale: Visual preview enables quality assessment and user feedback

verification.criteria: Returns screenshot URL and rendered HTML for specified page/viewport

features.description: Create inspect_logs tool aggregating SCSS, QWeb, Odoo, and preview errors
features.rationale: Log inspection enables self-debugging without user intervention

verification.criteria: Returns recent logs from all sources with severity classification

features.description: Implement web_search tool for fetching Odoo documentation and examples
features.rationale: External docs help agent handle unfamiliar patterns

verification.criteria: Returns top 5 search results; supports site: filtering for odoo.com

features.description: Create test_odoo tool for Docker-based module installation and snippet testing
features.rationale: Real Odoo testing catches integration issues static analysis cannot

verification.criteria: Installs theme on Docker Odoo; verifies module loads and snippets render

features.description: Create ModeRouter class detecting plan vs agent intent from user messages
features.rationale: Automatic mode detection provides seamless UX without manual switching

verification.criteria: Classifies 'what if' as plan, 'create X' as agent; 95% accuracy on test set

features.description: Implement intent classification using keyword matching + LLM fallback
features.rationale: Hybrid approach balances speed (keywords) and accuracy (LLM)

verification.criteria: Keywords: explore/options/what-if → plan; create/build/add → agent

features.description: Add mode switching UI with clear visual indicators (plan icon vs agent icon)
features.rationale: Users need to know which mode is active and be able to switch manually

verification.criteria: Mode badge shows current mode; click toggles between plan/agent

features.description: Create mode-specific context preparation (plan: read-only, agent: full tools)
features.rationale: Plan mode must not modify files; agent mode needs write access

verification.criteria: Plan mode disables write_file, edit_file tools; agent mode enables all

features.description: Implement seamless handoff from plan mode approval to agent mode execution
features.rationale: Handoff must preserve plan context for agent to execute

verification.criteria: Approved plan transfers to agent with selected option and full context

features.description: Create ContextManager tracking accumulated knowledge across agent steps
features.rationale: Accumulated context enables coherent multi-step generation

verification.criteria: Context grows with each tool result; persists across iterations

features.description: Implement context pruning keeping total tokens under 80% of model limit
features.rationale: Context overflow causes generation failures; must stay within limits

verification.criteria: Prunes oldest/least-relevant items when approaching limit

features.description: Add relevance ranking for context items based on recency and semantic similarity
features.rationale: Relevance ranking keeps most useful context when pruning

verification.criteria: Recent items and semantically similar items score higher

features.description: Create context serialization optimized for LLM injection (compact format)
features.rationale: Compact serialization maximizes useful context within token limits

verification.criteria: Serialized context is <50% smaller than raw JSON

features.description: Create PlanEngine class managing non-destructive exploration state
features.rationale: Plan Engine enables safe exploration without committing changes

verification.criteria: PlanEngine tracks query, options, clarifications; no file modifications

features.description: Implement request analysis detecting ambiguity and missing information
features.rationale: Detecting ambiguity prevents wasted generation on unclear requests

verification.criteria: Identifies vague terms, missing details, conflicting requirements

features.description: Add clarifying question generator for ambiguous requests (1-3 focused questions)
features.rationale: Questions before generation prevent bad output and wasted tokens

verification.criteria: Generates specific questions; avoids yes/no; focuses on actionable info

features.description: Create option generator producing 2-4 design approaches with trade-offs
features.rationale: Multiple options give users control over direction

verification.criteria: Each option has name, description, pros, cons, effort, files affected

features.description: Implement option scoring based on effort/quality/risk tradeoffs
features.rationale: Scoring helps users compare options objectively

verification.criteria: Options sorted by recommended score; scoring factors visible

features.description: Add detailed plan preview showing execution steps and affected files
features.rationale: Transparency builds trust; users see exactly what will happen

verification.criteria: Preview shows numbered steps, file paths, estimated duration

features.description: Create plan approval workflow with approve/modify/cancel actions
features.rationale: Explicit approval prevents unwanted changes

verification.criteria: Three clear buttons; modify opens refinement; cancel aborts

features.description: Implement plan-to-agent handoff preserving selected option and context
features.rationale: Seamless handoff ensures agent executes exactly what was approved

verification.criteria: Agent receives full plan context; executes selected option steps

features.description: Create DesignOption TypeScript interface with all required fields
features.rationale: Type safety ensures consistent option structure

verification.criteria: Interface includes: id, name, description, pros[], cons[], effort, files[]

features.description: Implement industry-aware option generation leveraging Odoo vertical presets
features.rationale: Industry context improves option relevance

verification.criteria: Restaurant requests get food-specific options; law gets formal options

features.description: Add effort estimation based on file count and complexity metrics
features.rationale: Effort estimates help users choose appropriate options

verification.criteria: Effort: low (<5 files), medium (5-15 files), high (>15 files)

features.description: Create ASCII mockup generator for quick option visualization
features.rationale: Visual preview helps users understand options without full rendering

verification.criteria: Generates simple ASCII layout showing section arrangement

features.description: Implement option comparison view showing side-by-side trade-offs
features.rationale: Side-by-side comparison simplifies decision-making

verification.criteria: Table view with options as columns; pros/cons/effort as rows

features.description: Create PlanModeIndicator component showing current mode with icon
features.rationale: Clear mode indicator prevents confusion about current state

verification.criteria: Shows 'Plan Mode' with thinking icon or 'Agent Mode' with robot icon

features.description: Implement OptionCard component with expandable pros/cons details
features.rationale: Cards provide scannable options with drill-down capability

verification.criteria: Card shows name, description; expand reveals pros/cons/files

features.description: Add PlanPreview component showing numbered execution steps
features.rationale: Step preview builds confidence before execution

verification.criteria: Shows steps 1-N with action, target, and rationale

features.description: Create ClarificationPrompt component for asking questions
features.rationale: Structured prompts improve answer quality

verification.criteria: Shows questions with input fields or multiple choice where appropriate

features.description: Implement ModeSwitcher toggle for manual mode selection
features.rationale: Manual override when automatic detection is wrong

verification.criteria: Toggle button switches between plan/agent; persists until changed

features.description: Add PlanHistory showing previous exploration sessions
features.rationale: History enables returning to previous explorations

verification.criteria: Sidebar shows past plans with query and timestamp; click to restore

features.description: Implement read-only codebase exploration in plan mode (no writes)
features.rationale: Plan mode must be safe for exploration

verification.criteria: write_file and edit_file tools disabled in plan mode context

features.description: Create hypothetical file change preview (diff without commit)
features.rationale: Preview shows what would change without actually changing

verification.criteria: Shows unified diff of proposed changes; clearly marked as preview

features.description: Add rollback preparation creating checkpoint before agent execution
features.rationale: Checkpoint enables undo if user doesn't like result

verification.criteria: Git commit or Yjs snapshot created before agent starts

features.description: Implement exploration session isolation (separate context per session)
features.rationale: Session isolation prevents cross-contamination of explorations

verification.criteria: Each plan session has unique ID and isolated context

features.description: Create OdooHMRPreview class managing iframe communication and hot updates
features.rationale: HMR engine is the core of real-time visual feedback

verification.criteria: Class manages iframe ref, source map, pending updates, message bridge

features.description: Implement CSS injection without page reload using style tag replacement
features.rationale: CSS injection enables <100ms style updates

verification.criteria: Style changes visible in iframe within 100ms; no page reload

features.description: Add QWeb template hot-swapping using morphdom for DOM diffing
features.rationale: morphdom preserves state while updating DOM structure

verification.criteria: Template changes morph DOM; form inputs and scroll position preserved

features.description: Create batched update system debouncing rapid changes for performance
features.rationale: Batching prevents UI thrashing during fast edits

verification.criteria: Multiple changes within 50ms batched into single DOM update

features.description: Implement scroll position preservation during HMR updates
features.rationale: Scroll jumping during updates is disorienting

verification.criteria: Scroll position restored after DOM morph

features.description: Add form input state preservation during morphdom updates
features.rationale: Losing form data during preview is frustrating

verification.criteria: Active input elements excluded from morph; values preserved

features.description: Create update flash animation for visual feedback on changed sections
features.rationale: Flash feedback shows users what changed

verification.criteria: Updated sections flash with subtle highlight for 300ms

features.description: Create SourceMapper building bidirectional DOM element to template line mapping
features.rationale: Source mapping enables click-to-select and editor sync

verification.criteria: Map: elementId → { path, startLine, endLine }; reverse lookup works

features.description: Implement data-snippet-id attribution during QWeb generation
features.rationale: IDs enable targeting specific sections for updates and selection

verification.criteria: Every snippet wrapper has data-snippet-id attribute with unique ID

features.description: Add line-level source tracking for QWeb templates
features.rationale: Line-level tracking enables precise editor navigation

verification.criteria: Clicking element reveals exact line numbers in source file

features.description: Create source location lookup from DOM element selection
features.rationale: Lookup enables preview → code navigation

verification.criteria: getSourceLocation(elementId) returns { path, startLine, endLine }

features.description: Implement editor highlight from preview selection
features.rationale: Clicking preview should highlight corresponding code

verification.criteria: Preview click opens file in editor and highlights relevant lines

features.description: Add preview highlight from editor cursor position
features.rationale: Code → preview navigation helps understand what code affects

verification.criteria: Cursor in snippet code highlights corresponding preview section

features.description: Create SelectMode toggle enabling visual element selection in preview
features.rationale: Select mode is the foundation of visual editing

verification.criteria: Toggle button enables/disables selection mode; cursor changes

features.description: Implement hover outline on selectable elements in select mode
features.rationale: Hover feedback shows what can be selected

verification.criteria: Dashed outline appears on hover over snippet containers

features.description: Add click handler in iframe mapping clicks to source locations
features.rationale: Click handler connects visual selection to source system

verification.criteria: Click posts message to parent with elementId and bounding rect

features.description: Create selection state management supporting single element selection
features.rationale: Single selection simplifies UI and avoids confusion

verification.criteria: Only one element selected at a time; new selection clears old

features.description: Implement keyboard navigation between sections (arrow keys)
features.rationale: Keyboard navigation improves accessibility and speed

verification.criteria: Up/down arrows move selection between sibling sections

features.description: Add selection persistence across HMR updates
features.rationale: Selection shouldn't be lost when code updates

verification.criteria: Selection restored by ID after DOM morph

features.description: Create FloatingEditor component appearing on element selection
features.rationale: Floating editor enables quick visual adjustments

verification.criteria: Panel appears near selected element with style controls

features.description: Implement color picker in floating editor updating SCSS variables
features.rationale: Color picker enables non-technical color adjustments

verification.criteria: Picker shows current color; change updates SCSS variable and preview

features.description: Add font selector with live Google Fonts preview
features.rationale: Font selection is common non-technical customization

verification.criteria: Dropdown lists available fonts; selection updates typography instantly

features.description: Create spacing controls for margin and padding adjustments
features.rationale: Spacing tweaks are common visual refinements

verification.criteria: Box model control with drag handles or input fields

features.description: Implement border-radius adjuster in floating editor
features.rationale: Border radius affects visual style significantly

verification.criteria: Slider adjusts border radius from 0 to 50px

features.description: Add 'Regenerate Section' button triggering agent for selected snippet
features.rationale: Section-level regeneration is key Lovable feature

verification.criteria: Button triggers agent with context for just selected section

features.description: Create 'Edit in Code' button jumping to source in editor
features.rationale: Quick path to code for advanced users

verification.criteria: Button opens file in editor at selected element's source line

features.description: Create viewport toggle for desktop/tablet/mobile preview
features.rationale: Responsive preview is essential for mobile-first design

verification.criteria: Toggle buttons resize iframe to 1024px, 768px, 375px widths

features.description: Implement device frame visualization around preview
features.rationale: Device frames make responsive preview more realistic

verification.criteria: iPhone/iPad/MacBook frames wrap preview at appropriate sizes

features.description: Add orientation toggle for portrait/landscape mobile preview
features.rationale: Orientation affects mobile layout testing

verification.criteria: Button rotates device frame between portrait and landscape

features.description: Create zoom controls for preview panel (25%-200%)
features.rationale: Zoom enables detail inspection and full-page overview

verification.criteria: Slider or buttons adjust preview scale; shows current percentage

features.description: Implement fit-to-screen auto-zoom option
features.rationale: Auto-fit maximizes preview size in available space

verification.criteria: Button calculates optimal zoom to fill panel without scrolling

features.description: Create injected HMR runtime script for iframe communication
features.rationale: Runtime script handles all HMR operations inside iframe

verification.criteria: Script exposes __PLATXA_HMR__ global with injectCss, updateSnippet, enableSelectMode

features.description: Implement postMessage bridge between parent and iframe
features.rationale: Message bridge is the communication channel for HMR

verification.criteria: Parent posts commands; iframe posts events; both handle errors gracefully

features.description: Add CSS for selection mode styling (hover, selected, flash)
features.rationale: Selection CSS provides visual feedback in select mode

verification.criteria: Hover: dashed outline; Selected: solid outline + label; Updated: flash animation

features.description: Create morphdom integration for efficient DOM diffing
features.rationale: morphdom enables state-preserving DOM updates

verification.criteria: morphdom imported and configured with onBeforeElUpdated hook

features.description: Implement error boundary for preview failures with fallback UI
features.rationale: Error boundary prevents blank preview on failures

verification.criteria: Preview errors show friendly message with retry button

features.description: Create AgentProgress component showing phase progression with checkmarks
features.rationale: Progress transparency reduces perceived wait time

verification.criteria: Shows phases: Planning ✓ → Generating ⏳ → Validating → Complete

features.description: Implement step-by-step progress with animated checkmarks
features.rationale: Animated progress provides satisfying feedback

verification.criteria: Steps animate from pending → running → complete with smooth transitions

features.description: Add current tool indicator showing active operation (searching, reading, etc.)
features.rationale: Tool indicator shows what agent is doing at granular level

verification.criteria: Badge shows current tool name with spinning icon

features.description: Create file modification tracker listing changed files in real-time
features.rationale: File list shows scope of changes being made

verification.criteria: Collapsible list updates as files are modified; shows add/edit/delete status

features.description: Implement estimated time remaining calculation based on plan steps
features.rationale: Time estimate manages user expectations

verification.criteria: Shows 'Estimated: ~30s remaining' based on steps completed vs total

features.description: Add progress percentage based on plan step completion
features.rationale: Percentage gives clear completion indication

verification.criteria: Percentage updates as steps complete; 100% at finish

features.description: Create animated progress bar with phase-specific colors
features.rationale: Colored progress bar adds visual polish

verification.criteria: Blue for planning, green for generating, yellow for validating

features.description: Create VersionTimeline component in sidebar showing generation history
features.rationale: Version history enables safe experimentation

verification.criteria: Vertical timeline shows versions with timestamps

features.description: Implement automatic snapshot capture after each successful generation
features.rationale: Auto-capture ensures no work is lost

verification.criteria: Git commit or file snapshot created after agent completes successfully

features.description: Add thumbnail generation for visual version history
features.rationale: Thumbnails make versions visually identifiable

verification.criteria: Small preview screenshot attached to each version

features.description: Create one-click restore to previous version
features.rationale: Easy restore encourages experimentation

verification.criteria: Click version → confirmation → files restored → preview updated

features.description: Implement version diff view showing before/after changes
features.rationale: Diff view helps understand what changed between versions

verification.criteria: Side-by-side or unified diff view of all changed files

features.description: Add version labeling and notes for user organization
features.rationale: Labels help users remember what each version was

verification.criteria: Click to add/edit label; optional notes field

features.description: Create version pruning for storage management (keep last 20)
features.rationale: Pruning prevents unlimited storage growth

verification.criteria: Auto-delete versions beyond limit; starred versions exempt

features.description: Create AgentStatusBadge showing current mode (plan/agent)
features.rationale: Status badge provides at-a-glance mode awareness

verification.criteria: Badge shows mode name with appropriate icon

features.description: Implement tool usage indicators in chat messages
features.rationale: Tool indicators show what agent did during generation

verification.criteria: Chips show tools used: 'searched 3 files', 'edited 2 files'

features.description: Add token/cost counter for current session
features.rationale: Cost transparency helps users manage API spend

verification.criteria: Shows 'Tokens: 12.3K | Cost: $0.05' in header

features.description: Create quality score display after generation completion
features.rationale: Quality score provides objective assessment

verification.criteria: Shows 'Quality: 85/100' with breakdown (syntax, a11y, structure)

features.description: Implement iteration counter for self-correction loops
features.rationale: Iteration count shows how hard agent worked

verification.criteria: Shows 'Completed in 2 iterations' after multiple passes

features.description: Create streaming message renderer with GitHub-flavored markdown
features.rationale: Streaming markdown renders agent output beautifully

verification.criteria: Markdown renders as it streams; supports headers, lists, code, links

features.description: Implement code block syntax highlighting in chat
features.rationale: Syntax highlighting improves code readability

verification.criteria: Code blocks have language detection and appropriate highlighting

features.description: Add file diff inline display in chat messages
features.rationale: Inline diffs show exactly what changed

verification.criteria: Diff blocks show added/removed lines with color coding

features.description: Create collapsible plan/execution details in messages
features.rationale: Collapsible details reduce clutter while preserving info

verification.criteria: Expand/collapse toggle for detailed plan and execution logs

features.description: Implement message actions (copy, regenerate, edit)
features.rationale: Actions enable common operations on messages

verification.criteria: Hover shows action buttons; copy copies text; regenerate re-runs

features.description: Add suggestion chips for common follow-up actions
features.rationale: Suggestions guide users to productive next steps

verification.criteria: Chips like 'Add another page', 'Change colors', 'Deploy' appear after generation

features.description: Create resizable panel system for chat/preview/editor
features.rationale: Resizable panels let users customize workspace

verification.criteria: Drag handles between panels resize them; constraints prevent collapse

features.description: Implement panel collapse/expand animations
features.rationale: Smooth animations improve perceived quality

verification.criteria: Panels animate smoothly when collapsed/expanded

features.description: Add panel layout presets (code-focused, preview-focused, balanced)
features.rationale: Presets provide quick access to common layouts

verification.criteria: Preset buttons instantly resize panels to predefined ratios

features.description: Create full-screen preview mode
features.rationale: Full-screen enables detailed preview inspection

verification.criteria: Button expands preview to fill window; ESC exits

features.description: Implement keyboard shortcuts for panel navigation
features.rationale: Keyboard shortcuts improve power user productivity

verification.criteria: Cmd+1 focuses chat, Cmd+2 focuses preview, Cmd+3 focuses editor

features.description: Create LogInspector aggregating errors from SCSS, QWeb, Odoo, and preview
features.rationale: Log aggregation is foundation of self-debugging

verification.criteria: Collects logs from all sources into unified stream

features.description: Implement SCSS compilation error capture with line numbers
features.rationale: SCSS errors are common and must include line info

verification.criteria: Captures dart-sass errors with file path, line, column, message

features.description: Add QWeb validation error capture with template and directive info
features.rationale: QWeb errors need template context for fixing

verification.criteria: Captures template name, line, directive type, error message

features.description: Create Odoo sidecar log streaming for runtime errors
features.rationale: Runtime errors only appear in Odoo logs

verification.criteria: Streams Odoo server logs via WebSocket; filters relevant entries

features.description: Implement preview iframe error capture (JS errors, failed loads)
features.rationale: Preview errors indicate rendering issues

verification.criteria: Captures window.onerror and resource load failures in iframe

features.description: Add build process error capture (missing files, import errors)
features.rationale: Build errors prevent deployment

verification.criteria: Captures file not found, import resolution, manifest errors

features.description: Create log severity classification (error, warning, info)
features.rationale: Severity helps prioritize which errors to fix first

verification.criteria: Each log entry has severity level; errors sorted first

features.description: Create ErrorAnalyzer parsing error messages into structured format
features.rationale: Structured errors enable targeted fixes

verification.criteria: Parses raw error into { type, file, line, message, context }

features.description: Implement file/line/column extraction from error messages
features.rationale: Location info enables precise navigation to error

verification.criteria: Extracts location from various error formats (SCSS, QWeb, Python)

features.description: Add root cause identification logic tracing errors to source
features.rationale: Root cause prevents fixing symptoms instead of problems

verification.criteria: Traces 'undefined variable' to missing import; traces 't-call' to missing template

features.description: Create error categorization (syntax, reference, type, runtime, structure)
features.rationale: Categories determine fix strategy

verification.criteria: Each error assigned to category; category influences fix approach

features.description: Implement error deduplication for repeated issues
features.rationale: Deduplication prevents fixing same error multiple times

verification.criteria: Same error from multiple places collapsed into single issue with count

features.description: Add error context extraction (surrounding code lines)
features.rationale: Context helps LLM understand error environment

verification.criteria: Includes 5 lines before/after error line in context

features.description: Create ErrorPatternLibrary with 50+ common Odoo/QWeb/SCSS patterns
features.rationale: Pattern library enables fast, reliable fixes for known errors

verification.criteria: Library contains 50+ patterns with regex, category, and fix template

features.description: Implement QWeb-specific error patterns (t-if, t-foreach, t-call, t-set)
features.rationale: QWeb directives have specific error modes

verification.criteria: Patterns for: missing closing tag, invalid expression, undefined variable

features.description: Add SCSS error patterns (undefined variable, syntax, nesting, imports)
features.rationale: SCSS errors are the most common generation failures

verification.criteria: Patterns for: $var undefined, missing semicolon, unclosed bracket, bad import

features.description: Create Odoo manifest error patterns
features.rationale: Manifest errors prevent module installation

verification.criteria: Patterns for: missing key, invalid syntax, bad dependency, wrong version

features.description: Implement snippet structure error patterns
features.rationale: Snippet structure errors break website builder

verification.criteria: Patterns for: missing oe_structure, invalid s_ prefix, bad data attributes

features.description: Add accessibility error patterns (contrast, labels, focus)
features.rationale: Accessibility errors have well-known fixes

verification.criteria: Patterns for: low contrast, missing alt, no focus visible, missing ARIA

features.description: Create pattern matching engine with fuzzy matching support
features.rationale: Fuzzy matching catches variations of known errors

verification.criteria: Matches patterns with minor variations in wording or formatting

features.description: Create AutoFixer generating targeted fixes for categorized errors
features.rationale: AutoFixer is the core of self-correction

verification.criteria: Generates fix based on error category and pattern match

features.description: Implement fix template system for pattern-matched errors
features.rationale: Templates provide fast, reliable fixes for known errors

verification.criteria: Each pattern has fix template with variable substitution

features.description: Add LLM-based fix generation for novel errors without patterns
features.rationale: LLM handles errors not in pattern library

verification.criteria: Unknown errors sent to LLM with context; fix generated from response

features.description: Create fix validation testing fix before applying permanently
features.rationale: Validation prevents fixes that introduce new errors

verification.criteria: Fix applied to temp copy; validated; only applied if validation passes

features.description: Implement fix confidence scoring based on pattern match quality
features.rationale: Confidence score helps decide auto-apply vs user confirmation

verification.criteria: Score 0-100 based on: pattern match (40), context clarity (30), fix simplicity (30)

features.description: Add multi-fix batching for related errors
features.rationale: Batching fixes related errors in single operation

verification.criteria: Related errors (same file, same cause) fixed together

features.description: Create fix explanation for user transparency
features.rationale: Explanations help users understand and learn

verification.criteria: Each fix includes plain-language explanation of what was wrong and how it was fixed

features.description: Implement retry logic with max 3 attempts per error
features.rationale: Multiple attempts catch transient failures and progressive fixes

verification.criteria: Same error retried up to 3 times with different approaches

features.description: Create exponential backoff strategy for repeated failures
features.rationale: Backoff prevents rapid repeated failures

verification.criteria: Delays: 0s, 1s, 3s between retry attempts

features.description: Add escalation to user for unfixable errors with manual suggestions
features.rationale: Unfixable errors must surface to user with guidance

verification.criteria: After 3 failed attempts, shows error to user with suggested manual fix

features.description: Implement manual fix suggestion generation for complex errors
features.rationale: Suggestions help users fix what auto-fix cannot

verification.criteria: LLM generates step-by-step manual fix instructions

features.description: Create error report for debugging support
features.rationale: Reports help debug persistent issues

verification.criteria: Report includes: error, context, attempted fixes, timestamps

features.description: Create ErrorPanel component showing current issues in sidebar
features.rationale: Error panel provides visibility into current issues

verification.criteria: Panel lists errors with severity icons; expandable details

features.description: Implement error-to-source navigation (click to jump)
features.rationale: One-click navigation speeds up manual debugging

verification.criteria: Click error → opens file in editor → highlights error line

features.description: Add fix preview before applying (diff view)
features.rationale: Preview lets users verify fix before applying

verification.criteria: Shows unified diff of proposed fix; Apply/Cancel buttons

features.description: Create error history tracking for debugging patterns
features.rationale: History helps identify recurring issues

verification.criteria: Shows past errors with timestamps and fix status

features.description: Implement error filtering and search
features.rationale: Filtering helps find specific errors in large lists

verification.criteria: Filter by severity, category, file; search by message

features.description: Wire FrontendOrchestrator into Agent Engine generation step
features.rationale: Leverages existing orchestrator for generation

verification.criteria: Agent Engine calls FrontendOrchestrator.process() for generation steps

features.description: Inject design tokens into agent context automatically on project load
features.rationale: Token context ensures brand-consistent generation

verification.criteria: Agent context includes serialized brand tokens under 500 tokens

features.description: Integrate accessibility auditor into validation phase
features.rationale: A11y validation ensures WCAG compliance

verification.criteria: Validation phase includes accessibility check; failures trigger fix loop

features.description: Connect design-analyzer to pre-generation context building
features.rationale: Design analysis improves generation quality

verification.criteria: User prompt analyzed for colors, layout, mood before generation

features.description: Route OKLCH palette generation through agent pipeline
features.rationale: OKLCH palettes ensure perceptually uniform color scales

verification.criteria: Theme generation uses OKLCH palette module from frontend-agent

features.description: Route all agent writes through Yjs document sync
features.rationale: Yjs sync ensures real-time collaboration

verification.criteria: write_file and edit_file tools trigger Yjs doc.transact()

features.description: Implement AI awareness cursor showing agent's current edit position
features.rationale: AI cursor shows users where agent is working

verification.criteria: Editor shows AI cursor (distinct color) at agent's edit position

features.description: Add AI editing indicator (pulsing highlight on modified lines)
features.rationale: Pulsing shows active modification in progress

verification.criteria: Lines being modified by agent have animated background

features.description: Create conflict prevention for concurrent human/AI edits
features.rationale: Conflict prevention ensures data integrity

verification.criteria: Agent pauses if human editing same file; resumes after human stops

features.description: Implement agent session isolation (separate Yjs awareness user)
features.rationale: Session isolation prevents confusion in multi-user scenarios

verification.criteria: Agent has unique awareness ID; distinguishable from human users

features.description: Create sidecar health check in agent startup
features.rationale: Health check ensures Odoo is available before testing

verification.criteria: Agent verifies sidecar responding before Odoo-dependent operations

features.description: Implement live Odoo preview rendering via sidecar
features.rationale: Sidecar provides accurate Odoo rendering

verification.criteria: Preview fetches rendered HTML from sidecar's Odoo instance

features.description: Add module installation testing via sidecar
features.rationale: Installation testing catches integration errors

verification.criteria: test_odoo tool installs module on sidecar; reports success/failure

features.description: Create sidecar log streaming to log inspector
features.rationale: Log streaming enables runtime error detection

verification.criteria: Sidecar logs stream to LogInspector via WebSocket

features.description: Implement sidecar restart on failure with automatic recovery
features.rationale: Auto-restart ensures sidecar availability

verification.criteria: Sidecar failure triggers restart; agent waits for recovery

features.description: Create deploy trigger from agent completion
features.rationale: Deploy trigger enables end-to-end automation

verification.criteria: 'Deploy' button appears after successful generation; triggers deployment flow

features.description: Implement pre-deploy validation checklist
features.rationale: Pre-deploy checks prevent broken deployments

verification.criteria: Validates: manifest correct, all files exist, QWeb valid, SCSS compiles

features.description: Add deployment progress streaming to UI
features.rationale: Progress feedback during deployment

verification.criteria: Shows: Packaging → Uploading → Installing → Verifying → Complete

features.description: Create post-deploy verification checking module loads correctly
features.rationale: Verification confirms successful deployment

verification.criteria: Verifies module installed; renders sample page; no errors in logs

features.description: Implement rollback on deployment failure
features.rationale: Rollback prevents broken production state

verification.criteria: Failed deployment triggers uninstall; previous version restored if available

features.description: Add deployment history tracking
features.rationale: History enables rollback to specific versions

verification.criteria: Shows past deployments with timestamps, versions, status

features.description: Create end-to-end test suite for agent workflows
features.rationale: E2E tests ensure system works as integrated whole

verification.criteria: Tests: full generation flow, plan→agent transition, error recovery

features.description: Implement unit tests for all tools
features.rationale: Unit tests ensure tools work correctly in isolation

verification.criteria: Each tool has tests for: success case, error handling, edge cases

features.description: Add integration tests for mode transitions
features.rationale: Integration tests verify component interactions

verification.criteria: Tests: plan→agent handoff, mode switching, context preservation

features.description: Create visual regression tests for preview
features.rationale: Visual tests catch unintended UI changes

verification.criteria: Screenshot comparison for: selection mode, device frames, floating editor

features.description: Implement performance benchmarks
features.rationale: Benchmarks track performance over time

verification.criteria: Measures: generation time, preview latency, tool execution time

features.description: Add load testing for concurrent generations
features.rationale: Load tests verify scalability

verification.criteria: System handles 10 concurrent users without degradation

features.description: Create agent metrics dashboard (latency, quality, cost)
features.rationale: Dashboard enables data-driven optimization

verification.criteria: Dashboard shows: avg generation time, quality distribution, cost per generation

features.description: Implement generation analytics tracking
features.rationale: Analytics inform product decisions

verification.criteria: Tracks: prompts, generations, errors, user satisfaction

features.description: Add error rate monitoring with alerts
features.rationale: Alerts catch problems early

verification.criteria: Alert triggered if error rate > 20% over 1 hour

features.description: Create user satisfaction tracking
features.rationale: Satisfaction tracking measures UX quality

verification.criteria: Optional thumbs up/down after generation; tracked in analytics

features.description: Implement A/B testing infrastructure for agent improvements
features.rationale: A/B testing enables data-driven improvements

verification.criteria: Can split users between agent versions; tracks metrics per variant

features.description: Create API documentation for agent tools
features.rationale: Documentation enables extension and debugging

verification.criteria: Each tool documented with: purpose, parameters, return value, examples

features.description: Implement inline code documentation for complex functions
features.rationale: Inline docs improve maintainability

verification.criteria: All public functions have JSDoc comments

features.description: Add architecture decision records (ADRs) for major decisions
features.rationale: ADRs capture why decisions were made

verification.criteria: ADRs for: agentic loop design, tool selection, HMR approach

features.description: Create troubleshooting guide for common issues
features.rationale: Troubleshooting guide reduces support burden

verification.criteria: Guide covers: agent stuck, preview not updating, deploy failing

features.description: Implement example prompt library for common use cases
features.rationale: Examples help users get started

verification.criteria: Library includes: theme creation, page addition, style modification examples

features.description: Implement context caching across requests
features.rationale: Context caching reduces token costs

verification.criteria: Repeated context items cached; cache invalidated on file change

features.description: Add tool result memoization
features.rationale: Memoization avoids redundant tool calls

verification.criteria: Same tool call within session returns memoized result

features.description: Create lazy loading for heavy UI components
features.rationale: Lazy loading improves initial load time

verification.criteria: Monaco editor, device frames, diff viewer lazy loaded

features.description: Implement preview render caching
features.rationale: Render caching reduces preview latency

verification.criteria: Unchanged pages return cached preview; cache invalidated on change

features.description: Add bundle size optimization (tree shaking, code splitting)
features.rationale: Bundle optimization improves load time

verification.criteria: Main bundle < 300KB; dynamic imports for heavy features
